sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70125" key="ne/krwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νέκρ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n70125.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lifeless, inorganic body,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄτομα ὅσα νεκρώματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:318:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">318.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
